name: Zucchini Mock Crab Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the tofu with a hand mixer until creamy.
2. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except zucchini. Mix well.
3. Place zucchini in a large strainer. Press out as much liquid as possible. Add zucchini to bread mixture. Mix with a fork for several minutes, until mixture is well combined and holds together.
4. Preheat a nonstick griddle or skillet over medium heat. Oil it lightly or spray with a nonstick cooking spray.
5. Divide zucchini mixture evenly into 8 portions and shape each portion into a patty. Place on prepared griddle and cook, turning several times, until patties are lightly browned on both sides.
6. Serve hot. Leftovers are good hot or cold.
